user.title: Configure DHL API
user.description: Enter API key and secret from the DHL Developer Portal. Sandbox mode: leave GKP fields empty. Production: enter GKP credentials from DHL.

data.gkp_user: GKP Username (production only, leave empty for sandbox)
data.gkp_password: GKP Password (production only, leave empty for sandbox)

data_description.api_key: developer.dhl.com -> Your App -> Authorization -> Consumer Key
data_description.api_secret: developer.dhl.com -> Your App -> Authorization -> Consumer Secret
data_description.api_type: Parcel DE Tracking recommended for Germany
data_description.sandbox: Enable while API status is 'Customer Integration Testing'

error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API credentials - check Consumer Key and Secret
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to DHL API

abort.already_configured: DHL Shipment Tracking is already configured

data_description.tracking_number: Full DHL tracking number without spaces
data_description.label: e.g. 'Amazon May' - used as sensor name

email_scanner.title: Email Scanner
email_scanner.description: The scanner connects to your mailbox via IMAP and automatically detects DHL tracking numbers in incoming emails. Supported providers: Gmail, GMX, web.de, T-Online, Outlook, Yahoo, IONOS, freenet. Gmail requires an app password.

data_description.imap_provider: Select your provider - server is filled in automatically
data_description.imap_password: For Gmail: app password from Google account settings
data_description.imap_scan_interval: How often the inbox is checked. Default: 300 (5 min)

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Update interval in seconds. Minimum: 600 s (10 min).

error.invalid_tracking_number: Tracking number is too short or invalid
error.tracking_already_added: This tracking number is already being tracked
error.imap_missing_fields: IMAP server, email address and password are required
error.imap_invalid_credentials: Invalid IMAP credentials - check email and password
error.imap_connection_error: IMAP connection failed - check server and port
